title: Bitcoin risks new 'purge' with bear-market losses still $35B below 2022 total
summary: Bitcoin realized losses remained below the $211 billion tally from 2022, leading to a prediction that the next bear-market bottom was not yet in.

title: Bitcoin most oversold since 2020 crash: Can BTC rebound to $70K next?
summary: Bitcoin’s latest oversold RSI mirrors 2020 and February 2026 setups that preceded 50% and 30% rebounds, putting $70K back in focus.
